event_description: Presence of standard application suite installers and configuration files identified in ProgramData, indicating baseline system provisioning.
Presence of Dropbox configuration database in user profile, indicating user staged or configured cloud storage synchronization.
Presence of multiple Chrome extension manifests and scripts in user profile, indicating user staged or installed browser extensions.
Presence of Windows Store application activation stores for various packages, indicating user staged or accessed pre-installed or store-acquired applications.
